title: Shipping Time
answer: Standard shipping typically takes 5–7 business days within the continental United States. Delivery time may vary depending on location and carrier.

title: Order Tracking
question_variants: How can I track my order
answer: Once your order ships, you will receive a tracking link by email. The tracking information is typically available within 24 hours after shipment.

title: Return Window
question_variants: How long can I return a product
answer: Customers may request a return or exchange according to our refund policy. Please refer to the official refund policy page for detailed instructions.

title: Damaged Product
question_variants: What if my product arrives damaged
answer: If your item arrives damaged, please contact our support team with photos of the damage. Our team will review your request and assist with a replacement or refund according to our policy.

title: Payment Methods
question_variants: What payment methods do you accept
answer: CyberHome accepts major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover) as well as PayPal, Shop Pay, Google Pay, and other secure checkout options.

title: Modify or Cancel Order
answer: If your order has not yet shipped, please contact support@cyberhome.app as soon as possible. While changes cannot be guaranteed, our team will do our best to assist.

title: Customer Support Contact
question_variants: How do I contact customer service
answer: You can contact CyberHome customer support via email at support@cyberhome.app.

title: Shipping Regions
answer: CyberHome currently ships to customers in the United States and Canada.

title: Voltage Compatibility
question_variants: What voltage do your appliances use
Are your appliances compatible with Canada
answer: All CyberHome appliances are designed for standard North American household voltage (110–120V), compatible with both the United States and Canada.

title: Product Warranty
answer: Most appliances include a one-year limited warranty covering manufacturing defects during normal household use.

title: Warranty Claim Process
answer: To request warranty service, please email support@cyberhome.app with your order number, product model, and a description of the issue.

title: Replacement Parts
question_variants: Where can I get spare parts
answer: Some replacement parts may be available for purchase. Please contact our support team for assistance.

title: User Manual
question_variants: Where can I find the user manual
answer: Some product manuals are available on the product support page or can be provided by our support team upon request.

title: Using Discount Codes
answer: You can enter your discount code during checkout in the discount field. The discount will be applied automatically if the code is valid.

title: VIP Discount Program
answer: CyberHome offers a free VIP discount program. Members can access exclusive promotions and special offers.

title: Product Cleaning
answer: Most CyberHome appliances are designed with removable components and easy-clean materials to simplify maintenance.
